scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.dev:memory: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev:memory" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm --prefix server run start" "npm --prefix client run start"
scripts.start:memory: concurrently "npm --prefix server run start:memory" "npm --prefix client run start"
